---
title: "gherkin_runner.py"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/tests/crucible/gherkin_runner.py"
loc: 47
complexity: 3
logic_score: 3.80
style_score: 3.87
intel_score: 9.40
overall_score: 6.46
---

## Intent
Python module facilitating EmpireGherkinCrucible, test_bridge_protocol_contract.

## Interaction Protocol
Import EmpireGherkinCrucible and call its primary methods.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 3.8/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.9/10
- **Intel [I]**: 9.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 13 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [unittest](file://unittest)
- [json](file://json)
- [os](file://os)
- [sys](file://sys)
- [asyncio](file://asyncio)
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)
- [unittest.mock](file://unittest.mock)
- [src.cstar.core.antigravity_bridge](file://src.cstar.core.antigravity_bridge)
- [src.cstar.core.daemon](file://src.cstar.core.daemon)
- [src.cstar.core.daemon](file://src.cstar.core.daemon)
- [src.cstar.core.daemon](file://src.cstar.core.daemon)

### Exports
- `EmpireGherkinCrucible`
- `test_bridge_protocol_contract`
- `test_bridge_non_ascii_contract`
- `test_muninn_deterministic_routing_contract`
- `test_muninn_low_confidence_uplink_contract`
